name: 112th Street Park
description: 112th Street Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Troy, NY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Averill Park H.S. Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Averill Park H.S. Tennis Courts in Averill Park, NY! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Boys and Girls Club of Southern Rensselaer County / Pickleball Rensselaer County
description: Boys and Girls Club of Southern Rensselaer County / Pickleball Rensselaer County is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rensselaer, NY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.
fees: Members only — Register Membership with Pickleball Rensselaer County required.

name: Greenbush YMCA
description: Greenbush YMCA is a place to play pickleball in East Greenbush, NY. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Hill Street Pickleball Courts
description: Public courts. Bring your own nets. First come, first served. Parking on Hill Street between Liberty and Washington.

name: Hoosick Falls Armory
description: Come play pickleball at Hoosick Falls Armory in Hoosick Falls, NY! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: Watervliet HS Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Watervliet HS Tennis Courts in Watervliet, NY! There are 5 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.
